notes: BM25 retrieval quality over the full SciFact dev set, using the production ranker's tokenizer, corpus IDF, and K1/B constants. Fully deterministic (fixed corpus, no LLM), so this gates every PR with no keys and tight floors. Observed: recall@10=0.916, recall@20=0.948, nDCG@10=0.797, MRR=0.763. Floors sit ~1.5 points below observed with a small tolerance to absorb cross-platform float rounding; a real ranker regression moves these by far more. This is also the bar hybrid retrieval (roadmap 1.1) and a reranker (1.2) must beat: note BM25 is already strong here because SciFact claims are lexically clean, so hybrid must earn its gains on this dataset.
